title: [W]Tribunal recommendation
label: [W]What tribunal recommendation would the claimant like to make?
hint: [W]Tell us what action the claimant would like the tribunal to recommend your respondent(s) take to reduce the impact of any discrimination which has occurred.
description: [W]Tell us what action the claimant would like the tribunal to recommend your respondent(s) take to reduce the impact of any discrimination which has occurred.
detailsTextRecom: [W]If the claimant's employer is found to have discriminated against them, a tribunal can make a recommendation that the respondent take specific steps to reduce the effect of the discrimination on the claimant
